title: cyperus coonoorensis
intro: Cyperus coonoorensis is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, native to the Western Ghats in India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus coonoorensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Cyperus coonoorensis include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
